title: Purrgress
description: Every boop becomes Purrgress. Hold to click, rank up to 10 million, and unlock a suspiciously ridiculous parade of pixel cats.
body:
## Purrgress 🐱✨🐾

Every boop becomes **Purrgress**. 🐈💥

Click, hold, rank up, and summon a deeply unnecessary parade of animated pixel cats. Your HUD purrs, sparkles, wiggles, bounces, and changes kitty forms as you climb from humble click gremlin to **Big Bang Button Boss** at **10,000,000 clicks**. 🐾🌌😼

## Features 🐱

- Hold left click to keep gaining clicks 🐾
- Animated pixel cat HUD 😺
- 41 ranks, all the way to 10 million clicks 🌟
- 41 silly kitty names, one for each rank 🐈‍⬛
- Moveable and resizeable HUD 📦
- Paw bursts, purr feedback, sparkles, and dramatic cat energy ✨
- Saves your progress locally 🐟

## Commands 🐾

- `/purrgress reset`  
  Reset your click progress.

- `/purrgress hud move`  
  Open the HUD mover. Use your paws to move it around. Zoom in and out to resize.

- `/purrgress hud <x> <y>`  
  Move the HUD to a specific screen position.

- `/purrgress hud scale <percent>`  
  Resize the HUD from `60` to `300` percent.

- `/purrgress hud reset`  
  Reset the HUD position and scale.

## Requirements 🧶

- Minecraft `1.21.8`
- Fabric Loader `0.18.0+`
- Fabric API
- Java `21`

## Config 🐈

Progress is saved locally in:

`config/purrgress.json`
